description_long: This is a green, polygonal bottle with a faceted body and a narrow neck, topped by a tan-colored cap. The bottle features a large brown label with a cream border on one side, and a wide brown band encircling the midsection, bordered by a lighter stripe. The body is mostly a solid green color, with the label and band providing visual contrast. The cap appears to be metallic or plastic, with a ridged edge for grip. The bottle's surface is matte and lacks any visible gloss or shine. There are no visible signs of damage, branding, or text on the label.
description: A green, faceted bottle with a tan cap, brown label, and a wide brown band around the middle. The surface is matte and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain green body and tan cap, with no visible label or band.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a large brown label with a cream border on the bottle's body.
description_view_2: Back view displays a wide brown band with a cream border encircling the bottle's midsection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the brown label and cream border, similar to view 1.
